course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE (Intermediate Listening)
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 11. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.transcript_zh: 在这个中级听力直播中，玩家在极限模式下建造围墙保护自己的房屋。他制作了铁剑来对抗怪物，击杀了一只蜘蛛并捡起了掉落的装备。当他的工具快要坏掉时，他需要建造新的工具。直播的最后，他向观众征求未来直播内容的建议。

segments.sentence_en: I build my wall? I want to build it close to my house. Ooh, I need to eat. Let's eat some pork.
segments.sentence_zh: 我要 __BLANK__ 围墙吗？我想把它建在房子附近。哦，小心。

segments.sentence_en: I'm going to build an iron sword. Let's get two iron. And let's build an iron sword. Let's go over to our.

segments.sentence_en: I'm going to pick up that armor. Let's kill this spider. Die. Die. Some armor. And let's swim back to the farm.
segments.sentence_zh: 我要捡起那个装备。让我们杀掉这只 __BLANK__。去死吧。

segments.sentence_zh: 我不知道。你来告诉我吧。给我一些关于 __BLANK__ 直播内容的建议。

question.prompt: What weapon did the player craft using iron?
